chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6510 of 2019 Shoaib Mahboob Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 05.05.2025 None present. -.-.- This is an old case of 2019, which is over six years old. At the very outset learned counsel for the petitioner was put on notice to satisfy the Court as to maintainability of the petition. On the last date of hearing on 02.12.2024 none was present for the petitioner without intimation and question of maintainability remained unresolved. Today also learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition and as such the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Head of Const. Benches Judge
